name: cloud ADR: emits a json sidecar with the structured decision fields
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-adr.sh" --title "Zero Trust mesh" --slug zero-trust-mesh --seq 7 --pillar security --decision "mTLS per service" --options "VPN, mesh, hybrid" --rationale "least privilege" --out-dir adr --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("adr/0007-zero-trust-mesh.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.decision_outcome&&j.decision_outcome.chosen&&Array.isArray(j.considered_options)&&j.status&&j.decision_id?0:1)' && echo sidecar 1>&2
